title: [Soup´s] Lower Grass
description: Makes the side textures of grass and such much lower.
body:
A texture pack that aims to lower the side textures of grass, podzol, mycelium, snow, and the pathways, _exponentially_. This allows you to mask the dirt texture and only shoe the grass with the use of a half slab.

This texture pack was based upon Vanilla Tweaks lower grass, yet I found it more aesthetically pleasing to make the grass slight shirters and have the same "combed-down" look as in vanilla!
